'''鈭歠-zh-n-zh''' ('''kafazhnezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:file|file]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:file|file]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-zh-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafazhnezhoko
|}
